title: Federation Assurance Standard
description: This standard establishes controls for Credential Providers and Facilitation Providers in federated identity systems. It addresses risk management, assurance levels, privacy preservation, and secure credential presentation to reduce identity theft, entitlement fraud, and misrepresentation.
